title: Duck Tacos with Frosty Slaw
description: A twist on traditional tacos, featuring crispy duck, topped with a refreshing frosty slaw and spicy relish.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and black pepper.
Sear the duck breast in a skillet over medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the duck to the oven and cook for 12-15 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Meanwhile, combine the shredded cabbage, lime juice, and chopped cilantro in a bowl.
Add the shredded frosty to the bowl and toss to combine.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Slice the cooked duck breast into thin strips.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few strips of duck onto a tortilla, topping with a spoonful of the frosty slaw, and finishing with a dollop of relish.
